text.title: Mutation Testing as the Agent Feedback Signal Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Every leaf references a rule id (including `skip-this-methodology`).

decision-tree.root-question: Are AI-written tests landing in the codebase AND is the suite stable enough to mutate?

conclusion.verdict: agent tests rare — humans pass review
stabilize the suite first; mutation amplifies flakiness
reject: scope too broad per PR
reject: signal not routed back to agent

text.example: PR changes `src/payments/`, Stryker mutates only that file, surviving mutants fed to agent, agent adds 4 tests, score 84% — merge.
